Package io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxNotificationCenter

Class FxNotificationCenter

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxNotificationCenter.FxNotificationCenter
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxNotificationCenter extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A stack of dismissible notifications anchored to a scene corner via the OverlayHost overlay layer.

FxNotificationCenter is a VBox that renders one FxAlert per entry. Call post(java.lang.String, io.forja.tokens.SemanticVariant) to add a notification; each is dismissible via its ×. The center is installed on a Scene via install(javafx.scene.Scene).

Static convenience: show(Scene, String, SemanticVariant) adds a notification to the scene's center (creating it on first use).

Builder usage:

     
      FxNotificationCenter nc = FxNotificationCenter.builder()
          .position(Pos.TOP_RIGHT)
          .maxVisible(5)
          .build();
      nc.install(scene);
      nc.post("Saved", SemanticVariant.SUCCESS);
See Also:
  • FxAlert
  • OverlayHost
  • FxNotificationCenter.Builder
